mcq:
I _____ now.
a) play b) am playing c) plays d) played

She _____ TV at the moment.
a) watch b) watches c) is watching d) watched
tf: We use present continuous for actions happening now. [True/False]
He is go to school now. [True/False]
short: Write a sentence using 'They are studying'
Change to present continuous: I eat

mcq:
A place where you can read books is a:
a) Hospital b) Library c) School d) Park

We buy medicine from a:
a) Supermarket b) Pharmacy c) Bakery d) Bank
tf: A museum is a place to see old things. [True/False]
short: Where do you go to buy food?

mcq:
Yesterday I _____ my homework.
a) do b) does c) did d) doing

She _____ to music last night.
a) listen b) listens c) listened d) listening
tf: We add -ed to regular verbs in the past. [True/False]
Go in the past is goed. [True/False]
short: Make a sentence in past simple

mcq:
I feel _____ when I have a fever.
a) happy b) sick c) excited d) sleepy

We should _____ to stay healthy.
a) sleep well b) eat junk food c) stay up late d) not exercise
tf: Drinking water is good for health. [True/False]
Eating too many sweets is healthy. [True/False]
short: What do you do when you have a headache?

mcq:
I _____ visit my grandma tomorrow.
a) am b) was c) will d) did

She _____ be a doctor in the future.
a) is b) was c) will d) does
tf: I will not go. This is negative. [True/False]
short: Change to negative: He will win

mcq:
A car is _____ than a bicycle.
a) fast b) faster c) fastest d) more fast

This book is _____ than that one.
a) interesting b) more interesting c) most interesting d) interestinger
tf: We add -er to short adjectives for comparison. [True/False]

mcq:
We should _____ trees to protect the environment.
a) cut b) plant c) burn d) destroy

Air pollution causes:
a) Health b) Diseases c) Happiness d) Strength
tf: Throwing garbage in the river is good. [True/False]
short: How can we keep our environment clean?
long: Write about protecting the environment in 5 sentences

mcq:
I like _____ in my free time.
a) sleep b) reading c) reads d) readed

He enjoys _____ football.
a) play b) plays c) playing d) played
tf: A hobby is something you do for fun. [True/False]
short: What do you do on weekends?
